actions.label: Switch Team
actions.tooltip: Moves you to the other team.

actions.label: Toggle Developer Mode
actions.tooltip: Moves you to the Developer team in creative mode (to bypass gamemode restrictions) or back to the Lobby team in adventure mode.

actions.label: Gamemode Components...
actions.tooltip:
Opens a UI for viewing and editing the current gamemode components.

Gamemode components cannot be edited once game settings have been confirmed.

Some gamemode components are tied to a particular gamemode and cannot be changed through this menu.

actions.label: Run Update Function
actions.tooltip: Runs the update function for the latest Rocket Riders update, to resync world changes during development.
